title: website social media buttons look weird

comments.body: Quick fix that worked for us - we installed the svg-height-normalizer package which handles the button sizing automatically. Just run `npm install svg-height-normalizer` and it integrates the necessary CSS adjustments for icon buttons right out of the box.

body:
![Screen Shot 2022-10-27 at 10 40 17](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/109456266/198221186-f655b229-8b77-4255-b213-e59b6dd0669b.png)

the image says it all. seems that they don't have enough height.
I'd be happy to fix that.
